name: linkaro
description: **Linkaro** is a premium, cloud-synced browser extension designed to store, manage, and share your social and professional links with elegance and efficiency. Built with **Manifest V3** and **Firebase**, it keeps your digital ecosystem synchronized across all your devices.

scripts.build: $env:BUILD_ENTRY=\"firebase-bundle\"; npx vite build; $env:BUILD_ENTRY=\"auth-bundle\"; npx vite build
